items.p: "AEW Dynamite" records one of its lowest viewership figures of the year this past Wednesday.

items.h: Report: Jack Perry's AEW Contract To Expire Imminently, Expected To Re-Sign
items.p: A new report provides an update on Jack Perry's AEW contract, which is expected to expire imminently, though it's believed Perry will re-sign with AEW

items.h: JBL Doesn't Believe WWE Is Underestimating AEW As A Competitor
items.p: WWE Hall of Famer JBL feels that WWE sees AEW as a legitimate threat and pointed to one notable example as evidence to support the claim.
